title: Luscious Jamaican Rice Pilaf
description: Sweet, velvety, cozy Jamaican rice pilaf with jasmine rice, beurre-monte, and tropical flavors, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, thyme, allspice, and lime zest, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in jasmine rice, stirring to coat the grains with oil and spices.
Add coconut milk and dark brown sugar, bringing the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let the rice absorb liquid for 15 minutes.
Remove from heat and fluff the rice with a fork, then stir in beurre-monte until melted and silky.
Taste and season with salt if desired.
Serve warm, garnished with a sprinkle of fresh herbs if available.
Enjoy the sweet, velvety coconut-infused flavor of this Jamaican pilaf.
